title: Withdrawing approval from technical qualifications
body: " This guidance has been transferred from the previous skills body the Institute for Apprenticeships and Technical Education (IfATE) following its closure on 31 May 2025. The guidance is under review and may be subject to change.   Skills England can withdraw approval from a technical qualification for certain reasons. The affected awarding organisation (AO) will take part in the withdrawal process.  For further information email:  Post16.skillsengland@education.gov.uk for level 2 and 3  HTQ.skillsengland@education.gov.uk for Higher Technical Qualifications (HTQs)  "

taxons.title: Further and higher education, skills and vocational training
